channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian journalist Amal Shamali in Gaza attack
item.description: Shamali, who worked for Qatar Radio, killed in an Israeli air strike on central Gaza's Nuseirat refugee camp.

item.title: Israeli attacks on Iran fuel sites aim ‘to break resilience of people’
item.description: As toxic clouds and rain smother Tehran, analysts say Israel’s aims is to break the resilience of the Iranian people.

item.title: Fear, uncertainty surround Iran women’s football team’s return home
item.description: Players body and activists say the team must be protected while head coach insists the players are eager to return.

item.title: Israel strikes Hezbollah financial institutions as Lebanon calls for talks
item.description: Israel strikes Al-Qard al-Hasan branches; Lebanese president says ready to resume negotiations to halt escalation.

item.title: Gaza food crisis worsens due to Iran war and border closures
item.description: People in Gaza have been rushing to markets as supplies dwindle even further due to regional conflict.

item.title: How US-Israel war on Iran deepens Gaza crisis
item.description: Expanding regional conflict shifts global attention as Gaza faces border closures, inflation and 'ceasefire' violations.

item.title: New missile video puts spotlight on US over Iran school attack
item.description: A newly released video suggests a US Tomahawk missile likely struck an Iranian elementary girls’ school in Minab.

item.title: Is the Iran war really costing the US $2bn per day?
item.description: The Pentagon has not yet released an official estimate of the cost of the US war on Iran.

item.title: Bangladesh closes universities due to Iran war energy crisis
item.description: Bangladesh closes universities due to Iran war energy crisis

item.title: As Khamenei son takes over, Nigerian Shias mourn Iran’s old supreme leader
item.description: In northern Nigeria, Shias see new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei as a 'continuation of his father’s resistance'.
